name: PRISM Edit: One Vector for All Temporal Answers

description: arXiv:2607.11327v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Model editing keeps large language models (LLMs) up to date without retraining, but temporal facts expose a limitation of the prevailing locate-and-edit paradigm: an update is not always a replacement. When a fact changes, the new answer should become current while the old answer may remain correct in historical time contexts. Building o...
author: Chen Huang, Qi Zheng, Ruiqin Zheng, Long Zeng, Yuantong Xu
